message:
feat(gateway): add structured logging infrastructure

- Add pino logger service with JSON output and pretty dev mode
- Implement correlation ID middleware with AsyncLocalStorage
- Create request/response logging middleware with automatic redaction
- Add sensitive data redaction utilities for API keys, passwords, emails
- Create audit service for tracking important events
- Add 15 unit tests for redaction utilities

Part of: flywheel_gateway-d18

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
